response.text:

rationale: Offer aligns with balanced sharing policy and geographic distribution to peers in distress; 0.5 kWh share maintains your SoC well above minimum threshold (0.38 > 0.25) while supporting critical need.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
